purpose: Subscribes to kind 1059 welcome gift wraps and kind 445 group messages for MLS group ingest. After Story 04 the subscribeToGroupMessages function no longer accepts an onApplicationMessage callback — application rumor dispatch is handled exclusively by the unified dispatcher wired in MarmotContext.

public_api.name: subscribeToGroupMessages
public_api.signature: async function subscribeToGroupMessages(groupId: string, relays: string[], mlsGroup: MarmotGroup, ndk: NDK, onMembersChanged?: (members: string[]) => void, onHistorySynced?: () => void): Promise<() => void>
public_api.description: Subscribes to kind 445 events for a group. Ingests via EpochResolver. No longer accepts or forwards onApplicationMessage — application rumor dispatch is owned by the unified dispatcher.

public_api.name: subscribeToWelcomes
public_api.description: Unchanged — subscribes to kind 1059 welcome messages.
